# 🚀 Feature Request

## 📋 Summary

Provide a clear and concise summary of your feature request.

---

## 💡 Problem Statement

Describe the problem you're trying to solve.

Example:

> It is difficult to manage multiple AI agents from a single dashboard.

---

## ✨ Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution.

Example:

> Add a centralized dashboard to manage AI agents and monitor their status.

---

## 🎯 Benefits

How would this feature improve VerityAgent?

- Increase productivity
- Better user experience
- Faster automation
- Easier configuration
- Improved AI capabilities

---

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

---

## 📸 Mockups / Examples

If applicable, add:

- Screenshots
- UI Mockups
- Flowcharts
- Code Examples

---

## 🧠 AI Category

Select all that apply.

- [ ] AI Agent
- [ ] Multi-Agent System
- [ ] Automation
- [ ] Workflow
- [ ] Python
- [ ] FastAPI
- [ ] MCP
- [ ] Chatbot
- [ ] Voice Assistant
- [ ] Dashboard
- [ ] API Integration
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Other

---

## ⚡ Priority

- [ ] Low
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] High
- [ ] Critical

---

## 🤝 Would You Like to Contribute?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No

---

## ✔ Checklist

Please confirm the following.

- [ ] I searched existing Issues.
- [ ] This feature has not already been requested.
- [ ] I clearly described the problem.
- [ ] I explained the proposed solution.

---

## ❤️ Thank You

Thank you for helping improve **VerityAgent**.

Every idea helps us build a better AI platform.
